svg.title: SafePath System Architecture Flowchart v2
svg.desc: Flowchart showing SafePath's frontend, backend, data, and admin layers with corrected dashboard fan-out.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about user access in SafePath')
sendPrompt('How does SafePath handle registration and login?')
sendPrompt('What can users do in the SafePath dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does incident reporting work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does street safety rating work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does routing work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the SafePath Auth Service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the SafePath Incident Service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the SafePath Rating Service')
sendPrompt('How does routing work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does Socket.io work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does SafePath use PostgreSQL and PostGIS?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis cache work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does Supabase Storage work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does LGU admin login work in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('What does the SafePath admin dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What spatial analytics does SafePath have?')
sendPrompt('How does admin manage incidents in SafePath?')
sendPrompt('How does updating incident status work in SafePath?')
